top_signals.title: Rivian stock falls more than 10% as company sells 75 million shares to raise capital
top_signals.summary: The capital raise occurred during extended hours trading following Rivian shares increasing 8.1% on Monday after increasing 19.2% last week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
